name: Betty Sutton
tweet: Doug and I send our deepest sympathies to Justice Michael Donnelly  (@Donnelly4Ohio) on the passing of his sister Colette. Our thoughts and  prayers are with you and your family and Colette’s children during this  difficult time.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: Heartfelt condolences to the family & friends of President George H.W. Bush. He gave so much in service to our country with honesty and integrity. Thank you for shining your light and recognizing the brilliance created when we each shine our own light for the good of one another.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: As we observe #VeteransDay I am grateful to all those who have served  and our military families for the sacrifices made in the name of our  freedoms. We can never truly repay their service but we should try today and every day. With eternal gratitude, thank you for your service.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: It has been a true honor to be the running mate of @RichCordray. He is a person of integrity, talent and with a heart of service, he would have made an exceptional governor for Ohio. Thank you, Rich, for caring so much and fighting so hard. Proud to run alongside you, friend.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: And to the many women out there who have felt the sting of injustice, do not let last night discourage you. Keep fighting. Lift each other up & keep marching forward toward a day when no one will be overlooked or undervalued. Know you matter. Keep voting. And yes, keep running!

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: To all of you, I want to strongly encourage you to keep believing and keep fighting to make a positive difference. All of the issues that were on the line – healthcare, worker's rights, women's rights, our schools, our environment - are worth fighting for.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: While last night was not the outcome we were hoping for,  I extend my deep and heartfelt gratitude to all who gave so much to support our campaign. You made calls, sent postcards, knocked on doors, organized your locals, and got friends and family out to vote.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: When @RichCordray asked me to join his ticket as Lieutenant Governor, I knew that he shared my commitment to standing up for everyday Ohioans. For anyone who feels left out and left behind. I am proud of the vision we offered and the message of change that we carried.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: That’s the choice between @MikeDeWine and @RichCordray.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: It’s whether you want the person who has spent 42 years siding with the wealthiest, most powerful interests in our state and country, or the person who takes on the hard fight, even in the face of overwhelming opposition, because it’s right.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: All politicians talk about being on your side. @RichCordray has lived it. The election is less than 60 days away. But the choice is clear.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: I knew that @RichCordray shared my commitment to standing up to the big interests. I know his record of taking on the powerful interests and I watched him take on the big banks, mortgage lenders, the payday lenders, and the credit card companies who rip off regular people.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: I’m running with @RichCordray to make sure Ohio has a Governor and Lieutenant Governor who stand up for people, and against the special interests. #OHGov

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: Our Attorney General, @MikeDewine, actually SUED to get rid of those protections for people with preexisting conditions, on the very first day he was in office. We’ll have more to say about THAT in this campaign.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: When the Affordable Care Act fight was going on in Washington – I was proud to work with President @BarackObama and Democrats in Congress to make sure that people with preexisting conditions – and, almost everyone has one – couldn’t be kicked off insurance policies any longer.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: And most importantly, I learned that the forces of the wealthy special interests never -ever – stop trying to push their agenda forward, and people like you and me always end up footing that bill.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: Along the way, I learned a few things. I learned to speak up and not wait to be called on. I learned that if a woman in politics is told to wait her turn, the game is ended before your turn comes up.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: My story is an #Ohio story. My father worked in the local boiler factory, and my mom worked at the public library. They taught me about hard work, about the importance of community, and about how to stand up for what you think is right.

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: If ever there was a time that we needed @RichCordray to take on the corruption and make government fight for you, and lead Ohio, the time is now!   Thank you to all of the voters for giving Rich Cordray and me the opportunity to make Ohio the state you deserve!

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "And we're going to stand for an Ohio where workers have a fair shake.  For far too long in Columbus, the big guys have gotten all the breaks while most Ohioans are left with nothing but underfunded schools and jobs that underpay."

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "We're going to strengthen our public schools, not rip money away from them.  And we are going to stand with Ohio women. For their right to be paid equally and heard equally. And always for their right to make their own reproductive health decisions!!!"

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "Rich and I are going to do things very differently [than what we've seen].  We're going to stand with Ohio workers and Ohio unions. That means fighting the lie that's being pedaled as right to work."

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "[@RichCordray] has always been on the side of the people. No matter what. That's the kind of Governor he will be."

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "[These] are the reasons I joined this ticket -  @RichCordray shares my values. He cares about people. He fights for people.  In fact, Rich has spent much of his life fighting back against the greediest big institutions in America."

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "These were the values that built Ohio's economy into what it once was. They show us the way forward to the future that we can have - a future where every Ohioan has a shot at a good job, quality education for their children, access to affordable healthcare & a secure retirement"

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "The 'Cash for Clunkers' program kept factory shifts working when moms and dads across Ohio needed a paycheck more than ever.  I fought to ensure that the ACA protections would kick in immediately - giving countless families peace of mind."

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "As a labor attorney, I fought to make workers whole when they were mistreated by their employers, or injured on the job.  As a member of the General Assembly, and member of Congress, I worked every day fighting for the working men and women and families who I represented"

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "The most important lesson [my parents] taught me was about the dignity of work, about how a good dependable job could provide much more than a paycheck."

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: "This is a great victory for the people of Ohio. For all of the people in our state who are ready for change. Are you ready for change?   I’ll tell you this - Rich Cordray and I are going to bring it to Columbus. You better believe it."

name: Betty Sutton

name: Betty Sutton
tweet: Gerrymandering is not just wrong on its face, it hurts us in governing. It has taken us to the right, to the right, to the right. Politicians are so afraid that someone more extreme than them will win, they don't care about fighting for common-sense reform that works for everyone
